note: Local engine per-card VRAM mode (mirror Pod MPI-146). Spun off from per-card distribution concern; sage risk confirmed Pod-only (local sage-free), only the blanket-lowvram VRAM gap remains.

summary: CLOSED cosmetic-only (verified on disk 2026-06-28). The investigation already cleared the scary risk: sage-on-Ada CUDA crash CANNOT happen locally (local engine never installs sageattention / never passes --use-sage-attention, MPI-50). The remaining gap (local comfy.js hardcodes --lowvram for all non-Apple GPUs, no VRAM branch) is HARMLESS: app.log proves local DOES init comfy-aimdo 0.4.10 on torch 2.12.0+cu130 (RTX 4060 Ti, 2026-06-28 16:00 + 17:41) -> --lowvram is a documented NO-OP under aimdo. Per the card's own step-3, aimdo-always-on locally => cosmetic-only, no functional fix. Not doing the cosmetic --lowvram drop (zero behavior change). Closing.
